pages.title: VEX Platform Challenges
pages.description:
Navigate precise obstacle courses using timing and momentum to master challenging platform puzzles. Leap through intricate levels featuring moving platforms and spikes, testing reflexes and spatial awareness. Each stage demands careful jumps and avoidance tactics to reach the exit without falling or triggering traps.

Key Features

• Momentum-based jump mechanics  
• Responsive directional controls  
• Progressive obstacle difficulty  
• Time attack trial mode  
• Minimalist industrial level design

pages.title: Vex 9 Platform Game
pages.description:
Navigate challenging obstacle courses using precise timing and momentum control in this platform game. The core mechanic revolves around fluid parkour-style movement through intricate levels filled with traps and hazards. Players must conquer increasingly difficult stages by mastering jumps and wall runs to reach the exit and avoid deadly obstacles.    

Key Features

• Momentum-based platforming mechanics  
• Responsive jump and wall run controls  
• Progressive level difficulty scaling  
• Time trial and challenge modes  
• Minimalist hazard-filled environments

pages.title: Vex 8 Platform Game
